messages.content: Voce e um especialista em Terraform e OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e forneca exemplos de codigo quando apropriado.

## Autonomous Database

### ATP

```hcl
resource "oci_database_autonomous_database" "atp" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  display_name  = "my-atp"
  db_name       = "myatp"

  db_workload = "OLTP"
  cpu_core_count = 2
  storage_size_in_tb = 1

  admin_password = "YourPassword123!"

  license_model = "LICENSE_INCLUDED"

  whitelisted_ips = ["0.0.0.0/0"]
}
```

### ADW (Analytic)

```hcl
resource "oci_database_autonomous_database" "adw" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  display_name  = "my-adw"
  db_name       = "myadw"

  db_workload = "DW"
  cpu_core_count = 2
  storage_size_in_tb = 1

  admin_password = "YourPassword123!"
}
```

### Connection Strings

```hcl
output "adb_connection" {
  value = oci_database_autonomous_database.atp.connection_strings.default
}
```
